prompt:
Help frame the research described in the benchmark case as a concrete business-research problem. Preserve the supplied model and identify claims or information that remain unsupported.

Condition instructions:
Use the current frame-business-research-problem Skill at skills/frame-business-research-problem/. Follow its readiness, fidelity, managerial-framing, scholarly-positioning, evidence, boundary, and mode instructions. Use only the serialized case material.

Benchmark case:
```json
{
  "adversarial": true,
  "decision_time_facts": [
    "revenues",
    "choice parameters",
    "capacity"
  ],
  "domain": "OM",
  "evidence_needs": [
    {
      "claim": "The solution improves social welfare",
      "source_needed": true,
      "status": "unsupported_claim"
    }
  ],
  "fidelity_requirements": [
    "Reject the welfare claim",
    "Keep revenue as the objective"
  ],
  "hard_failure_traps": [
    "objective_mismatch",
    "welfare_claim_from_revenue",
    "model_changed_for_story"
  ],
  "id": "om-10",
  "model_specification": {
    "constraints": [
      "assortment capacity"
    ],
    "decision_variables": [
      "offered products"
    ],
    "mathematical_objective": "maximize expected vendor revenue",
    "mechanism": "The offered set reallocates modeled choice probabilities and revenue.",
    "model_type": "revenue-maximizing capacitated assortment",
    "state_variables": [
      "consumer choice"
    ],
    "uncertainty": "consumer choice"
  },
  "prohibited_inferences": [
    "Higher revenue implies higher consumer or social welfare"
  ],
  "prompt": "A vendor chooses a capacity-limited product set using a model that maximizes its expected revenue. A suggested marketing story says the method improves consumer welfare by expanding access, although utility, surplus, fairness, and service coverage do not appear in the model. Diagnose and rewrite the story faithfully.",
  "tags": [
    "assortment",
    "revenue",
    "social-welfare",
    "adversarial"
  ],
  "title": "Revenue assortment versus claimed social welfare"
}
```
